oneLiner: A native macOS terminal emulator (SwiftUI + embedded Ghostty) with a workspace model and CLI built for driving Claude Code sessions.
next: Cut a release with the Workspace→Session flatten (v0.19.0) after a few days of daily-driving it.
Validate the /tian implement harness (bumped to v1.2.0 for the session model) on a real multi-slice run: async fan-out overlap + structured handoff (ADR 0003).

milestones.title: Agent delegation (/tian implement) shipped in a release

shipped.summary: Workspace→Session hierarchy flatten merged (ADR 0004): removed Spaces/Sections/Tabs — a session = one never-split Claude pane + toggleable terminal panel; persistence v6→v7 migration; clean-break IPC/CLI v2 (session verbs, TIAN_SESSION_ID); sessions auto-name from the Claude pane title; Claude exit closes the session; terminal spawn + inspect panel follow Claude's EnterWorktree. Verified: 907 tianTests green, live v6→v7 + CLI smoke, 8-angle adversarial review with all confirmed findings fixed.

Released v0.18.0 (sidebar tab-name + per-tab branch rows): built, notarized (Apple Accepted), stapled, GitHub Release live, Sparkle appcast signed + pushed. Gotcha: the Sparkle EdDSA private key is NOT in the local keychain, so publish.sh dies at sign_update — signed the DMG directly via `sign_update --ed-key-file` after verifying the key derives to the app's SUPublicEDKey (KDEXWrfR…).

Sidebar per-tab rows now show the tab name (Row 1) with the git branch moved to Row 2 beside the diff/PR badges (arrow.triangle.branch icon + muted name); non-git tabs show the name only. Dropped the 3-row cap and the '+N more' overflow so every Claude-task tab gets a visible row. /orchestrate (single code-implementer per change, W=1), /code-review medium clean, Debug build green.
